# Founder / Team Disclosure Template

Status: TEMPLATE — USER REVIEW AND IDENTITY CHOICE REQUIRED

This template is designed for the official ProfitNet website. It can support Uniswap CCA identity review and general listing diligence without publishing sensitive personal information.

## ProfitNet Team

### `[PUBLIC NAME]` — Founder / Project Lead

`[80–150 word factual biography covering relevant professional or technical experience and the founder's role in ProfitNet. Avoid price, return, partnership, or endorsement claims.]`

Public profiles:

- LinkedIn: `[URL]`
- X: `[URL]`
- GitHub or professional portfolio: `[URL, optional]`

Project responsibilities:

- `[responsibility]`
- `[responsibility]`
- `[responsibility]`

Token relationship and conflicts:

`[Plain-language disclosure of founder/team PNET holdings, treasury or operational-wallet role, ability to manage liquidity after any lock expires, and any paid relationships relevant to public promotion.]`

Identity statement:

> I am publicly associated with ProfitNet and authorize this page to identify my role. The links above are my current public professional profiles.

Last reviewed: `[YYYY-MM-DD]`

## Publication Rules

- Obtain the founder's explicit approval before publishing a name, photograph, biography, or profile link.
- Use the same public identity across the official website, LinkedIn, X, press materials, and listing forms.
- Do not publish a home address, government ID, birth date, personal phone number, or private email.
- Do not describe pseudonymous or incomplete evidence as full identity verification.
- Keep token holdings, operational authority, and liquidity-management disclosures accurate and dated.
